question: What techniques exist for self-improving agents without fine-tuning?

coverage.aspect: limits of self-improvement without external feedback

claim_lines: - **Verbal feedback / reflection loops:** the agent turns task feedback into natural-language reflections and stores them for later attempts. Reflexion is the canonical example. https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.11366

- **Self-refinement loops:** the same model critiques its own draft and revises iteratively; Self-Refine does this without supervised training, extra training, or RL. https://proceedings.neurips.cc/paper_files/paper/2023/hash/91edff07232fb1b55a505a9e9f6c0ff3-Abstract-Conference.html

- **Prompt/workflow optimization:** instead of changing weights, the system searches over prompts or instruction variants and keeps higher-scoring candidates. OPRO is the canonical prompt-optimization approach, and later ACL work shows small models may only get modest gains. https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.03409 https://aclanthology.org/2024.findings-acl.100/

- **Limits without external feedback:** purely intrinsic self-correction is fragile; one paper finds it can fail or degrade, while another says it can work only under careful settings like zero temperature and fair prompts. https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.01798 https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.15673
- verbal feedback — Reflexion explicitly uses verbal feedback signals and episodic memory to improve later actions. https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.11366
- reflection — Reflexion’s core mechanism is self-reflection on failures before the next attempt. https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.11366

- self-refinement — Self-Refine iteratively critiques and revises its own output without extra training. https://proceedings.neurips.cc/paper_files/paper/2023/hash/91edff07232fb1b55a505a9e9f6c0ff3-Abstract-Conference.html
- prompt or workflow optimization — OPRO iteratively optimizes instructions/prompts using prior candidates and scores. https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.03409

- limits of self-improvement without external feedback — self-correction is not reliably strong on its own and may require careful prompts/decoding. https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.01798 https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.15673
